source_filing: JPMorgan Chase & Co. 10-K (CIK 19617), fiscal year ended December 31, 2025
original_text: Such regulatory challenges may affect the scope, requirements or effective dates of the regulations applicable to the Firm.
modified_text: These regulatory challenges affect the scope, requirements and effective dates of the regulations applicable to JPMorgan Chase & Co.
claim: Regulatory challenges are altering the scope, requirements, and effective dates of the regulations applicable to JPMorgan Chase & Co.
citation_as_written: JPMorgan Chase & Co. 10-K, fiscal year ended December 31, 2025
notes: Source hedges 'may affect' (possible effect); report drops the modal and asserts it as present fact ('affect'). Cited correctly to JPMorgan; certainty overstated.
